title: 5 Insurance Brokers to Watch Amid High Technological Investment
text: Increased demand for insurance products, given an aging population, baby boomers and millennials and the adoption of technology should drive insurance brokers like MMC, AON, AJG, WLTW and HVRRY.

title: AON Forms STG to Better Serve Insurance, Reinsurance Clients
text: AON builds STG to empower insurance and reinsurance customers to effectively allocate capital and drive the financial position of their organizations amid tiding over the industry headwinds.

title: Aon Establishes Strategy and Technology Group, Uniting Key Capabilities to Optimise Clients' Operational and Financial Performance
text: New global 400-strong team combines expertise and technology to build re/insurer resilience LONDON , Sept. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, today introduced its new Strategy and Technology Group (STG) to bring together a wide range of insight and software solutions to help property & casualty, life insurance and reinsurance clients build flexible and resilient enterprise structures that drive strong financial performance.

title: Aon Appoints Adriana Karaboutis to Board of Directors
text: DUBLIN , Sept. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, today announced that Adriana Karaboutis, chief information and digital officer of National Grid plc, has been appointed to its Board of Directors.
